title: Emissive Blocks+
body:
Emissive Blocks plus here to make Ores and blocks shine

basically the default texture like litted furnaae has fire on the bottom and it's not glowing! so i just make it glow :)

and bunch of things are added like Amethyst, Trial Spawner, Trial Vault, Glowing Ores to help you find ores easier and even more

This pack need Optifine or Continuity with the emissive texture option turned on

hope you enjoy it :)
